initiatives.name: Lakeland Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Mutual aid collective serving the unhoused community of downtown Lakeland. Join us every Sunday at Munn Park at 11:30 AM!

initiatives.name: Lakeland Women's Collective
initiatives.description: We believe in 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘪𝘵𝘺 & 𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘪𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘺 as a form of resistance. Pro-Land back, anti-capitalist-racist-imperialist, abolitionists. 𝐂𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐄𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐄 GLOBALLY 𝐍𝐎𝗪.
